scripts.bundle: shx mkdir -p ./dist && shx cp -r ./apps/* ./dist && shx rm ./dist/app && shx mkdir -p ./dist/app && shx cp -r ./apps/app/dist/* ./dist/app
scripts.build:dev: npm run copy-assets && npm run build:dev --workspace=pwa && npm run bundle
scripts.build:release: npm run copy-assets && npm run build:release --workspace=pwa && npm run bundle
